titleStmt.title: SII 17.142: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 142. (A.R. No. 122 of 1904.) TĪRTHANAGARI, CUDDALORE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Śivāṅkurēśvara temple.
This inscription also seems to belong to the same king in whose reign No. 141 is dated.

It records the śiṟumuṟi (agreement) entered into between the authorities of the temple of Tiruttiṉainagar-uḍaiyār and apparently the local bodies (kaṇkāṇikaraṇattār), regarding the re-assignment of the magaṇmai, previously collected at the toll gates and 20 mā of land formerly given (see No. 144, below) by Tāmandai-tTeṉṉavarāyaṉ of Peruṅgaṉūr, to the west of the madiḷ in Tāṉṟūr in Pañchavaṉ-mādēvipura-paṟṟu, for the daily food offerings from Chittirai of the 9th year and for the festival for the god in the month of Vaikāśi.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ . śrīmaṟkittikkuRead śrī meykkīrttikku.
mel komāṟapaṉmar tiri
puvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī
vīrapāṇṭiyatevarkku yāṇ
ṭu 9Āvatu Uṭaiyār tiruttiṉai
naka(r)ruṭaiyār koyil kaṇkāṇi karaṇa
ttārkku ciṟumuṟi . Ikkoyilukku Oṉpa
tāvatu cittirai mātam mutal nittappa
ṭikku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Oru caṉti Amutu
ceyyavum Āṭṭaittirunāḷ tiruvaikā
ci tirunāḷ Eḻuntaruḷavum Amutupaṭi cā
ttuppaṭi tiruppaḷḷittāmam Uḷḷuṭṭavai
yiṟṟukku Uṭaṟkkoḷppaṭikku muṉṉā
ḷ vaḻiccārikaiyil vaittukkuṭutta ma
kaṇmaiyum pañcavaṉmātevipurappaṟṟi
l tāṉṟūril matiḷukku meṟkku peruṅkaṉū
r tāmantait teṉṉavarāyaṉ muṉṉāḷ tirunā
mattukkāṇiyāka dharmmadānam paṇṇikkuṭut
ta vilāṭattaraiyaṉ kaṇṭamāṉa karuntaṭaṅ
kaṇṇiviḷākam nilam paṉṉiraṇṭu māvum
vaṭakkaṭaiya puṉ(ñ)cey nilam Eṭṭumāvu
m Āka nilam Irupatu .
Digital edition of SII 17.142 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
